summary: Iteration 18 - Admin Panel Testing Complete. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All admin pages fully functional with real production data. Admin login, dashboard, user management, genealogy, admin roles, analytics, audit logs, and withdrawals all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with blendlinknet@gmail.com / link2026blend! - Returns token and is_admin flag
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns admin profile with is_admin: true
Backend: GET /api/admin-system/dashboard - Returns users, content, financial, admins, recent_users
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/search - Returns 46 total users with real data
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/search?query=test - Search filtering works
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/search?status=active - Status filtering works
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id} - Returns user details with stats, transactions, withdrawals
Backend: GET /api/admin/genealogy/tree - Returns 10 root trees with user hierarchy
Backend: GET /api/admin/genealogy/user/{user_id}/network - Returns upline/downline network
Backend: GET /api/admin/genealogy/orphans - Returns 22 orphan users
Backend: GET /api/admin/roles/admins - Returns 1 admin (super_admin role)
Backend: GET /api/admin/system/analytics?period=7d - Returns signups, active_users, transactions data
Backend: GET /api/admin/system/analytics?period=30d - Returns 30-day analytics
Backend: GET /api/admin/finance/overview - Returns total_bl_coins: 29814, total_usd_balances: 0
Backend: GET /api/admin/system/health - Returns database stats, user counts
Backend: GET /api/admin/system/activity-feed - Returns 11 audit logs, 10 recent signups, 20 transactions
Backend: GET /api/admin/withdrawals/list - Returns withdrawals with counts
Backend: GET /api/admin/withdrawals/stats/summary - Returns total_paid_out, total_fees_collected
Backend: GET /api/admin/withdrawals/kyc/pending - Returns 1 pending KYC user
Backend: Admin endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Frontend: Admin login flow - Login redirects to /feed, then /admin accessible
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Shows 46 Total Users, 3 Posts, 5 Listings, 29,814 BL Coins
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Quick Actions (Manage Users, Settings, Analytics, A/B Tests)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Recent Users section with real user data
Frontend: User Management (/admin/users) - Shows 46 total users with BL Coins, USD, Referrals, Status
Frontend: User Management - Search functionality works
Frontend: User Management - Filters panel with status filters (All, Active, Suspended, Banned)
Frontend: User Details - Shows Profile Information, Admin Actions, Recent Transactions
Frontend: User Details - Admin Actions: Suspend, Ban User, Reset Password, Force Logout, Adjust Balance
Frontend: Genealogy Management (/admin/genealogy) - Visual tree hierarchy with users
Frontend: Genealogy Management - Search, depth control (3 levels), zoom controls
Frontend: Admin Management (/admin/admins) - Shows 1 admin with Super Admin role
Frontend: Admin Management - Role cards (Super Admin, Co-Admin, Moderator, Support)
Frontend: Analytics (/admin/analytics) - Real-time data with charts
Frontend: Analytics - Overview, User Growth, Financial, System Health tabs
Frontend: Analytics - Financial Overview showing BL Coins, USD Balances, Withdrawals, Commissions
Frontend: Audit Logs (/admin/audit) - Shows 15 audit log entries
Frontend: Audit Logs - Tabs for Audit Logs, Recent Signups, Transactions
Frontend: Audit Logs - Detailed entries with Time, Admin, Action, Target, Details, IP
Frontend: Withdrawals (/admin/withdrawals) - Stats cards, KYC panel, withdrawals table
Frontend: Withdrawals - Pending KYC Verifications with Approve/Reject buttons
critical_code_review_comments: All admin endpoints properly secured with authentication and permission checks
Real production data displayed correctly across all admin pages
Admin panel uses new production endpoints: /api/admin/users/*, /api/admin/finance/*, /api/admin/genealogy/*, /api/admin/roles/*, /api/admin/system/*
Audit logging working - all admin actions are tracked with timestamps, admin info, action type, target, and IP address
Financial overview shows accurate totals: 29,814 BL Coins in circulation across 46 users
seed_data_creation: Used existing production data - 46 users, 29,814 BL Coins total
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully tested and working. All endpoints at /api/admin/* are functional. Dashboard shows real user counts and BL coins. User Management allows search, filter, view details, and admin actions (suspend, ban, reset password, force logout, adjust balance). Genealogy shows visual tree hierarchy. Admin Management shows role-based access control. Analytics shows real-time charts and financial data. Audit Logs track all admin actions with GDPR compliance. Withdrawals page manages withdrawal requests and KYC verifications. Admin credentials: blendlinknet@gmail.com / link2026blend!
